S.FORM: Ra√ļl Castro I 1931 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 3 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ra√ļl Castro, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Cuba anini i ci Ra√ļl Castro, patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: ra*…ĺ ¶astro~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ra*…ĺ ¶astro~u, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~u~ub~b~va anini i ¶i ra*…ĺ ¶astro~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Ra√ļl Castro I 1931 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 3 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ra√ļl Castro, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Cuba anini i ci Ra√ļl Castro, patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
